title: melissa debilis
intro: Melissa debilis, also known as Melissa officinalis var. altissima, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a variant of the well-known lemon balm plant, with a higher concentration of essential oils, which gives it its distinct characteristics. The medicinal properties of Melissa debilis lie in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The herbal preparations of Melissa debilis include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being.
